customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high self-direction. Dave is a retired homeowner with 26 years of prior solar experience — he is not skeptical of solar, he is evaluating fit. His resistance is logistical (scheduling flexibility) not emotional. He will not respond well to pressure; he responds to competence and specificity.
unresolved_concerns: Bill not yet collected — Dave needs to get it from his renter. No follow-up mechanism was established beyond an informal 'shoot them a message.'

House roof is approximately 20 years old — potential DQ or re-roof requirement not addressed. Closer needs to assess whether solar on the house is viable or whether the garage-only design is the path.
Roofing interest raised by Dave at 07:04 — not captured or routed. Closer should surface this and determine whether a roofing conversation runs parallel to the solar proposal.
sensitive_topics_raised: Property is held in a brother's trust with Dave as trustee — title structure is non-standard. Closer should confirm Dave has authority to execute a contract as trustee before investing full proposal time.
Property is a rental — Dave is not the utility bill payer. Renter relationship adds a step to bill collection and may affect Dave's motivation calculus (savings go to renter, not Dave directly).
exact_promises_rep_made: Wednesday appointment at 11AM (flagged as tentative by Dave).
Text with date, time, and Bart's number to be sent after the call.
Design will be built once the utility bill is received from the renter.
Specialist will run through roofing program details.
closer_should_know: The appointment is explicitly tentative — Dave said 'tentatively, that sounds fine' and has a stated pattern of playing every day by ear. The bill is not in hand. Confirm the appointment the morning of and have a bill-collection path ready. Also: Dave asked about roofing unprompted — this is a live cross-sell signal the setter did not route. Closer should surface it early in the proposal conversation.
